# Quadratic equation name origin

## Short Teaching Summary
The name Quadratic comes from "quad" meaning square because the variable gets squared, like x2.

## Best Analogy
- The term 'quadratic' comes from the Latin word quadratus, meaning 'square,' because the highest exponent of the variable is 2.
